programme.desc: During a routine undercover prostitution sting, Columbus Vice Detective Andrew Mitchell shoots and kills 23-year-old Donna Dalton Castleberry.

programme.desc: A man hurls furniture onto a busy NYC street from atop a skyscraper; a self-proclaimed bride is arrested for DUI on her supposed wedding day, and more!

programme.title: E4 - Super Relaxing Music
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E4 - Nina’s Football Dream!
programme.desc: Join Nina as she imagines being a soccer superstar in the World Cup! Help her race against friends, lead her family in a fun-filled day of soccer and games, and learn to drive a tractor on Grandpa's farm. With Nina, every day is an adventure!

programme.title: E5 - Race to the Goal: Football & Sprints
programme.desc: Join Cody and Nina for a day of friendly competition! Imagine playing in the World Cup, race as the tortoise and the hare, and challenge the parents to a soccer match. Learn that being fast isn't always what makes you a winner!

programme.title: E5 - Race to the Goal: Football & Sprints
programme.desc: Join Cody and Nina for a day of friendly competition! Imagine playing in the World Cup, race as the tortoise and the hare, and challenge the parents to a soccer match. Learn that being fast isn't always what makes you a winner!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: It's time for Blippi to get curious & creative! A mysterious book appears in the clubhouse, & when Blippi opens it, the brand-new Curiosity Crew jumps out! After helping the crew figure out what they're looking for (popsicles!), Blippi & Meekah join them on some creative adventures. They learn all about how to mix colors to make a beautiful rainbow painting, shrink down to dance with Bendjamin the Klutz & ride a library cart on a hunt for books about dinosaurs!

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E6 - Calm Songs & Sweet Dreams!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E4 - Nina’s Football Dream!
programme.desc: Join Nina as she imagines being a soccer superstar in the World Cup! Help her race against friends, lead her family in a fun-filled day of soccer and games, and learn to drive a tractor on Grandpa's farm. With Nina, every day is an adventure!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E5 - Race to the Goal: Football & Sprints
programme.desc: Join Cody and Nina for a day of friendly competition! Imagine playing in the World Cup, race as the tortoise and the hare, and challenge the parents to a soccer match. Learn that being fast isn't always what makes you a winner!

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Sometimes friends need a hero, & Buster is always ready to help! When he gets caught in a scary storm, he rushes to shelter, but then he spots his friend Scout, stuck in a muddy puddle! Buster has to muster all his courage to go back out & rescue her. But sometimes, even heroes need help! On another day, Buster gets stuck in the mud himself & has to be towed out by Terry Tractor. From stopping a runaway train to standing up to a bully, Buster is always there for his friends.

programme.title: E1 - Our Favorite Family Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Buster on his favorite family adventures! When Mummy has to dash off to work, Buster & Grandpa have to make dinner together. They follow a recipe & it creates a big mess, but it's still tasty! The adventures continue as Buster & Daddy spend the day together, playing soccer & chasing a runaway kite! Plus, the whole family goes on an outdoor camping trip where a runaway tent causes chaos through the campsite.

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!

programme.title: E4 - Lake Whitefish & Wild Salad
programme.desc: Daniel and Arthur angle for lake white fish with their wives Avani and Sara, and gather wild salad ingredients on a remote lake in Maine.

programme.title: E4 - Sturts Steps
programme.desc: Flanked by three Australian States this journey re-traces part of the expedition undertaken by European Explorer Charles Sturt in the 1840’s, when he was looking to discover an inland sea, in the very interior of the country.

programme.title: E4 - Lake Whitefish & Wild Salad

programme.title: E4 - Sturts Steps
programme.desc: Flanked by three Australian States this journey re-traces part of the expedition undertaken by European Explorer Charles Sturt in the 1840’s, when he was looking to discover an inland sea, in the very interior of the country.

programme.title: E9 - China
programme.desc: In China, Rooftop and Catfish continue their East Asian adventures. As if the leeches in Indonesia weren’t enough, the bikers move on to bee sting therapy in China, strengthen their stomachs with some grasshoppers and mice wine, and attempt to transport hundreds of pounds of fish on nothing but a bike and sheer will power. The duo also undergo a hike of Chinese mountain Hua Shan, electro acupuncture, and kung fu train, all to be able to endure dim mak, ‘the death touch.’ Can Rooftop and Catfish handle this intense physical journey, or will the death touch get the best of them?

programme.title: E3 - Burmese Pythons
programme.desc: If you asked experts what the most prevalent predator species in the United States is, without hesitation, the answer would be the Burmese pythons in the Florida Everglades. Growing up to 26-feet long and weighing as much as 200 pounds, the Burmese python has completely altered the ecosystem of the Everglades by eliminating over 99% of the native mammal population. To save the 'Glades, the hunter has become the hunted as Dusty 'Wildman' Crum has made it his mission to eradicate this species. Luckily for Yia, python is considered a delicacy in many countries, and Dusty believes these constrictors should be restricted to life on a plate, which helps take a bite out of the problem.

programme.title: E6 - Lima
programme.desc: Lima is known as the Garden City, but driving here definitely isn't a walk in the park.

programme.title: E4 - Gareth Southgate
programme.desc: In Bear’s Mission with Gareth Southgate, the leader of the Three Lions squad will swap the football field for some of the UK’s toughest terrain and tackle the ultimate challenge, as he joins Bear on a mission across the wilds of Dartmoor.

programme.title: E6 - Lima
programme.desc: Lima is known as the Garden City, but driving here definitely isn't a walk in the park.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: The iconic Giant Panda is on the brink. With only 1600 left in the wild, pressures on their natural habitat and a notoriously small window for reproduction are edging them towards extinction - fast. Over 1 year, we go behind-the-scenes and follow the incredible work of a dedicated group of zookeepers and vets as they race to get Singapore’s famed couple… to fall in ‘love’. The team from the River Safari has a tough road ahead. This film follows the year that Kai Kai and Jia Jia become the focus of attention not just from the general public but from the scientists themselves in the greatest challenge Singapore Zoo has faced yet.

Over 1 year, we go behind-the-scenes and follow the incredible work of a dedicated group of zookeepers and vets as they race to get Singapore’s famed couple… to fall in ‘love’. The team from the River Safari has a tough road ahead. This film follows the year that Kai Kai and Jia Jia become the focus of attention not just from the general public but from the scientists themselves in the greatest challenge Singapore Zoo has faced yet.

programme.title: E4 - Lake Whitefish & Wild Salad
programme.desc: Daniel and Arthur angle for lake white fish with their wives Avani and Sara, and gather wild salad ingredients on a remote lake in Maine.

programme.title: E9 - China
programme.desc: In China, Rooftop and Catfish continue their East Asian adventures. As if the leeches in Indonesia weren’t enough, the bikers move on to bee sting therapy in China, strengthen their stomachs with some grasshoppers and mice wine, and attempt to transport hundreds of pounds of fish on nothing but a bike and sheer will power. The duo also undergo a hike of Chinese mountain Hua Shan, electro acupuncture, and kung fu train, all to be able to endure dim mak, ‘the death touch.’ Can Rooftop and Catfish handle this intense physical journey, or will the death touch get the best of them?

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: The iconic Giant Panda is on the brink. With only 1600 left in the wild, pressures on their natural habitat and a notoriously small window for reproduction are edging them towards extinction - fast. Over 1 year, we go behind-the-scenes and follow the incredible work of a dedicated group of zookeepers and vets as they race to get Singapore’s famed couple… to fall in ‘love’. The team from the River Safari has a tough road ahead. This film follows the year that Kai Kai and Jia Jia become the focus of attention not just from the general public but from the scientists themselves in the greatest challenge Singapore Zoo has faced yet.

programme.title: E4 - Gareth Southgate
programme.desc: In Bear’s Mission with Gareth Southgate, the leader of the Three Lions squad will swap the football field for some of the UK’s toughest terrain and tackle the ultimate challenge, as he joins Bear on a mission across the wilds of Dartmoor.

programme.title: E3 - TeamS4H/Training Camp
programme.desc: With HurtCamp complete, Commando and Adam have a big decision to make as to which athletes will join the team for season 4.

programme.title: E4 - Backyard Ultra
programme.desc: Event one for the team is the hottest ultra running event format around, Backyard Ultra, in rural Victoria.

programme.title: E4 - Sturts Steps
programme.desc: Flanked by three Australian States this journey re-traces part of the expedition undertaken by European Explorer Charles Sturt in the 1840’s, when he was looking to discover an inland sea, in the very interior of the country.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E12 - Raspberry
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'raspberry' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today is all about raspberries - we see a red raspberry, a small raspberry, a fancy hat raspberry and a high raspberry.

programme.title: E16 - The Okido Fizz War
programme.desc: Mayor Oki and Geoffrey get competitive. Whose fizzy water will come out on top?

programme.title: E29 - Flap Away Home

programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: E18 - Chinamax / Russian Standard / Abalone
programme.desc: How do they build the biggest bulk cargo ships in the world? How do they turn wheat and glacier water into vodka? How do they grow millions of abalone shellfish?

programme.desc: Find out how petanque balls, biologic medicines, asphalt pavers, and basque espadrilles are made.

Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Knowing that Mak, the middle-aged newspaper editor often misses his late spouse, his beloved children persuade him to date Siu Fung, the singer who lives next door. At this moment, Siu Fung's cousin, Uncle Sam, returns from the states and proposes to marry Siu Fung. One day, dispute happens between Sam and Mak which makes Siu Fung so mad with Mak...

programme.title: Will Of Iron
programme.desc: Maggie returns to Hong Kong to bring her grandmother back for settlement in Canada. Only her fiance Michael comes to welcome her back, but Jacky and Carol, her good friends and married couple, fail to appear. Jacky Chan, a cartoonist, is in fact a long-time cocaine doper and is therefore deeply in debts. Sam, one of the hired thugs of the drug-dealer constantly comes to collect debts. It greatly irritates Carol. Michael goes so far as to collaborate with the drug dealer for benefits. Moreover, he supplies cocaine to Jacky once in a while. Jacky is under the delusion that cocaine inhalation will help him gain inspiration in cartoon-drawing, but contrarily, cocaine only makes him get into real trouble. He resorts to satisfy his urge for drugs by snatching his wife's money and accidentally hurts her. Carol ultimately tells the whole story in tears to Maggie...

programme.title: Point Of No Return
programme.desc: After police detective Lau is ambushed and killed, his best friend Pitt vows to get the killer. A series of investigation follows. Pitt finally finds an eyewitness to the killing - Fat Goose who is persuaded to testify against the killer Lam Man Fu. Lam Man Fu chases and attacks Pitt and Fat Goose. Finally, Pitt arrests him but Superintendent Keung frees Lam Man Fu and removes Pitt from the case. Then Lam Man Fu firebombs Fat Goose's residence. Fat Goose moves into Pitt's home and strikes a fast friendship with Angel, Pitt's reporter sister...

programme.title: From Riches To Rags
programme.desc: Ricky and Fatso are friends in need. They are in dire need of money since they are only paid slave wages at the bottling factory. By nature, Ricky is a dreamer. In his day dreams, he is romancing with Jo Jo, the movie idol. Ricky and Fatso buy a lottery ticket and become millionaires overnight. In one of these nights out in town, Ricky is suddenly attacked by an upset stomach. In no time, a quack doctor diagnoses the seizure as terminal cancer. Ricky seriously considers suicide. But he is also appalled by the drawbacks inherent in the many methods of doing himself in primarily the pain. It is on a rooftop from which he is supposed to make a plunge that he saves a poor man from suicide by giving the latter all the money he has. In gratitude, the newly rich man promises to hire a killer to finish off his suffering benefactor...

programme.title: The Diary Of A Big Man
programme.desc: In this delightful screwball comedy, Chow Yun Fat plays a stock broker who met 2 women of his dream on the same night - boutique owner Joey (Joey Wang) and air stewardess Sally (Sally Yeh). Unable to say no to either one, he ended up marrying them both, one in New York and the other in Paris. When the wives befriended each other, he solicited the help from his buddy Hung (Waise Lee) to get him out of each tight spot.

programme.title: Will Of Iron
programme.desc: Maggie returns to Hong Kong to bring her grandmother back for settlement in Canada. Only her fiance Michael comes to welcome her back, but Jacky and Carol, her good friends and married couple, fail to appear. Jacky Chan, a cartoonist, is in fact a long-time cocaine doper and is therefore deeply in debts. Sam, one of the hired thugs of the drug-dealer constantly comes to collect debts. It greatly irritates Carol. Michael goes so far as to collaborate with the drug dealer for benefits. Moreover, he supplies cocaine to Jacky once in a while. Jacky is under the delusion that cocaine inhalation will help him gain inspiration in cartoon-drawing, but contrarily, cocaine only makes him get into real trouble. He resorts to satisfy his urge for drugs by snatching his wife's money and accidentally hurts her. Carol ultimately tells the whole story in tears to Maggie...

programme.title: Point Of No Return
programme.desc: After police detective Lau is ambushed and killed, his best friend Pitt vows to get the killer. A series of investigation follows. Pitt finally finds an eyewitness to the killing - Fat Goose who is persuaded to testify against the killer Lam Man Fu. Lam Man Fu chases and attacks Pitt and Fat Goose. Finally, Pitt arrests him but Superintendent Keung frees Lam Man Fu and removes Pitt from the case. Then Lam Man Fu firebombs Fat Goose's residence. Fat Goose moves into Pitt's home and strikes a fast friendship with Angel, Pitt's reporter sister...

programme.title: Fractured Follies
programme.desc: Since Nam has been swindled of his life savings by his scheming cousin on a ruined site, his crippled daughter May takes up the hard task of turning the premise into a supermarket. May is injured in a traffic accident caused by taxi-driver Joe who assumes his reckless driving has made May a cripple. He then volunteers to help her to set up the supermarket. Love blossoms. Joe sells his taxi in order to invest in the supermarket, forcing his brother, Sea, and sister, Cher to work there too. Sea falls for May's cousin Scarlet who fancies only Joe...

programme.title: The Legend of Speed
programme.desc: After winning yet another race, the underground drag car racer king, Sky, was framed by his rival's brother Fung. On the run in Thailand, Sky hooks up with his long lost father, himself a legendary racer, who steers his son back on course for the ultimate showdown of speed with Fung.

programme.title: E2 - Return of the Light
programme.desc: Experience the north Atlantic’s intense, brief summer with its animal residents. Follow Arctic fox cubs learning to hunt for survival, an otter pup going solo for the first time, a mate-seeking puffin, and tiny reindeer taking their first steps.

programme.title: E3 - Risk and Reward
programme.desc: The drought is finally over, but traversing the forest for food is still a gamble. See some leaders take the risk, leaving home territories undefended to feast on a cicada boom. When they return, trespassers are ready for a fight.

programme.title: E4 - The Road to Independence
programme.desc: As the babies grow, new power struggles break out in each troop. Watch as every member, from fierce Queen Crystal to low-ranking Erica, jockeys for position. Meanwhile, the babies start to understand how allies and enemies will shape their future.

programme.title: E3 - Risk and Reward

programme.desc: As the babies grow, new power struggles break out in each troop. Watch as every member, from fierce Queen Crystal to low-ranking Erica, jockeys for position. Meanwhile, the babies start to understand how allies and enemies will shape their future.

programme.title: E3 - Warriors of the Llanos
programme.desc: The flat savannas of the Colombian Llanos are governed by seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving arena, there are no second chances, and only creatures best adapted to their brutal extremes will make it through a year.

programme.title: E1 - Sweeping Shores
programme.desc: The African intertidal zone is home to a unique universe of plants and creatures. Here, life has adapted to survive in a challenging marine environment - some species are able to live on exposed rocks, while others prefer the shelter of rock pools.

programme.desc: The East River 3 are on the verge of victory! The Turtles and Mutanimals must team up to stop them, but not everything is as it seems... what is the PEARL and why does Goldfin want it?

programme.title: E116 - In the Sky / Best Buddies
programme.desc: When Diamondo refuses to give the twins a ride in his spaceship they embark on some space exploration of their own. // Best becomes entangled in a series of awkward situations when he pretends to know someone he's never met before.

programme.title: E804 - InTODDnito / Weather Or Not
programme.desc: When Darcy's birthday party falls on the same day as one of Lisa's hero scientist's talks, Lisa sends TODD in her place to the party. // Flip sees a lucrative business opportunity when he discovers Nacho has the ability to predict the weather.

programme.title: E102 - The Bird Scene
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, André and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls with disastrous results.

programme.title: E809 - Bulking and Sulking / Wild Goss Chase
programme.desc: Dad struggles to run Lynn's Table when his brother Lance opens up a gym above the restaurant. // Privy to all the gossip at school, Lola is recruited to write her own gossip column in the school newspaper.

programme.title: E102 - The Bird Scene
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, André and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls with disastrous results.

programme.title: E302 - Bookworm / The Cookie Test
programme.desc: Booky the Bookworm arrives at the library to read the kids a story, but Phil loses his pet worm Todd Jr. in the excitement. // Angelica tries to teach Chuckie and Kimi how to speak up for what they want, since they're going to be living together.

programme.title: E108 - For Your Spies Only
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe attend Parent-Teacher Night, leaving Chloe and friends home without adult supervision. When Jinx finds the Air Lair, he believes spies are targeting the school, and his meddling puts the Thundermans' school jobs at risk.

programme.title: E616 - Hiccups and Downs / The Loathe Boat
programme.desc: Luna needs to get rid of a nasty case of the hiccups before a big rock competition. // The Morticians Club plan Bertrand's escape from the cruise ship his parents work on.

programme.title: E1005 - One False Move / Personal Train Wreck
programme.desc: The Loud kids and their cousins come up with a plan to convince Lance and Sharon to move their family to Royal Woods. // When Lynn gets the opportunity to be a trainer at her uncle's gym, she struggles to motivate her out of shape clients.

programme.title: E702 - Child's Play
programme.desc: Luna and the Moon Goats try to become a kiddie band in order to raise enough money for new equipment.

programme.title: E311 - Wiener Takes All / Stuck in an Elevator
programme.desc: Tired of doing grunt work at the Krusty Krab, Squidward takes a new job as Manager of Weenie Hut Jr's. // Squidward gets trapped in an elevator with SpongeBob and Patrick on his way to return a nearly overdue library book.

E109 - The Clocktopus/You Remind Me Of Someone/What Rhymes With Omnitrix?/A Sticky Situation
programme.desc: In a peaceful coastal town, Ben must not only face the archaic antagonist Steam Smythe and his latest creation - the Clocktopus - but also his deepest, darkest fear: squid!

programme.title: E13 - A. Little Muriel/Courage the Fly/Scuba-Scuba Doo/Conway the Contaminationist/The Duck
programme.desc: A tornado rips through Nowhere, destroying the farmhouse and turning Muriel into a little girl again--just 3-and-a-half years old. Courage must find a way to bring back his 'old' Muriel.

programme.title: E435 - A Case Of Mistaken Identity/Arctic Adventure/Giant Lamput
programme.desc: It's a perfect evening. Droopy has finished his day at work and Thief has successfully completed his art heist. But an accident with Lamput causes their briefcases to be swapped.

programme.title: E102 - Museum Peace / Here Kite-Y Kite-Y / Street Wise Guys / Chameleon Story
programme.desc: Jerry helps an elephant escape from the museum. Hi-flying hijinks ensue when Tom and Jerry take kites to the park and disrupt street performers throughout the city.

programme.title: E5 - The Unicorns Have Got To Go/Really Real Wrestling/Camping Can Be Cool/The Last Laserd
programme.desc: Mordecai buys a new cologne to attract Margaret instead of hanging out with Rigby like he promised.

programme.title: E1356 - Porch Pirates/A Sticky Situation/The Perfect Pitch?/Pool Season/Kyle
programme.desc: After their package is stolen, the Titans must join a crew of porch pirates to get it back.

programme.title: E19 - Panda's Sneeze/Brother Up
programme.desc: Panda bears have a very adorable (and violent!) sneeze, and our Panda is no exception. When a Vine video of his lovable sneeze goes viral, Panda becomes a 'cute' sensation, which causes Nom Nom to try to fend off of this new challenger to his throne.

programme.title: E23 - Board Game Empire
programme.desc: Amato and friends find a mysterious board game which transports them into its world, and the only way out is to win.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E210 - Barbazoo's Diary / The Great Reporter
programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: E206 - The Crew Builds A Gym / The Crew Puts On A Construction Show
programme.desc: Coach Karima asks Rubble & Crew to build a gym for the gymnastics show. But when the beam is too high for Lily, it's up to the pups to save the day.//When a traveling show can't get to Builder Cove, Rubble & Crew decides to build a show of their own!

programme.title: E105 - The Tenderest Bond Of All / The Orange Empire
programme.desc: While the family makes pottery, Barbabravo and Barbabright try to set the world record for the largest cheese souffle. // The Barbapapas decide to go to the park. While her brother and sisters play , Barbalib can't help to control everything.

programme.title: E106 - It's Only A Mystery... / The Battle
programme.desc: Taking after his favourite detective, Barbabravo looks for a case to solve. Can he solve the mystery of the missing ice statue? // Inspired by their favourite heroes, the Barbababies make costumes. But no heroes are possible without villains...

programme.title: E618 - The Fastest Of Them All
programme.desc: When a greedy queen casts a spell to make a few of our friends go slow, Blaze and AJ must race her for the magical cure

programme.title: E107 - The Crew Builds A Beaver Home / The Crew Fixes A Road
programme.desc: The power is out in Builder Cove! When the pups find out a beaver is to blame, they've got to build him a new home to bring the power back. // When Speed Meister damages the road ahead of the town helper parade, the pups work fast to repave the way.

programme.title: E1304 - Pups Save A Hum-Kicker / Pups Save The One-Man Band
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger turns up the power on his robotic soccer cleats, the 'Hum-Kickers', and starts wrecking the town. // Francois causes musical mayhem, as a one-man band, when he plans a special song for Wally's birthday.

programme.title: E313 - Fire Engine
programme.desc: When Mummy Pig helps out at Miss Rabbit's fire station, she is called upon to douse the flames at Daddy Pig's out-of-control barbecue!

programme.title: E417 - Pups Save A Space Rock / Pups Save A Good Mayor
programme.desc: Everest, the Turbots and a Space Rock get trapped in a cave. // Mayor Goodway goes missing and Mayor Humdinger causes havoc in Adventure Bay.

programme.title: E737 - Long Train Journey
programme.desc: Daddy Pig receives a letter saying he must go away on business to test some very important concrete!

programme.title: E221 - The Crew Builds A Winter Wonderland / The Crew Builds A Giant Snow Squirrel
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew work together to transform Builder Cove's beach boardwalk into a bright, festive winter wonderland. // When a snow day gets in the way of Motor & Mix's Super Squirrely Whirly plans, Rubble & Crew do what they do best... build!

programme.title: E521 - Pups Save A Cuckoo Clock / Pups Save Ms. Marjorie's House
programme.desc: Jake's family cuckoo clock and is sliding down the mountainside with Chickaletta stuck inside! Ryder calls on Everest to help the pups to save the day! // Mysterious holes are appearing all over Ms. Marjorie's yard.

programme.title: E214 - The Louvre / Opposite Day
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, the Barbapapa family will discover the most incredible museum: the Louvre! // Barbalala has decided to respect all the rules of the day of opposites.

programme.title: E207 - Rocket Track
programme.desc: Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: E307 - Compost
programme.desc: Peppa and George take a bin of vegetable peelings to Grandpa Pig's compost heap. Worms inside the bin turn the peelings into compost, which Granny and Grandpa use to help their plants grow.

programme.title: E803 - Pups Save A Rubble-Double / Pups Save A Clown
programme.desc: Rubble dreams that he's been taken aboard a spaceship and meets his alien double. When the ship crashes on an alien planet, he needs help. // The Pups must save Humdinger and his kittens when they mess around with Toodles the Clown's tiny clown car.

programme.title: E207 - Rocket Track
programme.desc: Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: E805 - Recorders
programme.desc: The children have a music lesson with Madame Gazelle and all learn how to play the recorder.

programme.title: E101 - Lucky Croc / Sleepover Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile search for a lucky item to help them win a bike raffle. // When Mr. Crocodile can't fall asleep at his first sleepover, Daisy helps him figure out why.

programme.title: E5 - Spice Week
programme.desc: It's spice week in the Bake Off Tent. For the first challenge, the bakers have to make spiced tarts. One of the most challenging technical bakes of the season sees the bakers attempt steamed ginger puddings and the showstopper requires the bakers to make baklava, complete with their own phyllo pastry.

programme.title: E1 - East Yorkshire
programme.desc: Zahid and Ferzana ambitiously set out to transform an old coastguard station on an exposed East Yorkshire headland into a cantilevered, three-storey steel and glass box.

programme.desc: This week on The Great South African Bake off, the bakers are celebrating vegetables through a range of delicious challenges. Siba and Paul task them with vegetarian galettes, a traditional Turkish flatbread, and vegetable showstoppers.

programme.title: E1 - Jaipur
programme.desc: In Jaipur, new recruits prepare for the most important event of the year, a lavish dinner for the Maharaja of Jaipur. As managers work out how to deal with incontinent elephants, the young waiting staff must put on the biggest show of their careers.

programme.title: E58
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E9 - 一次性打卡6大非遺項目
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

Vasudha E2
programme.desc: A happy-go-lucky Vasudha comes as a maid to business leader Chandrika's house and craves her approval despite their ideological differences. Will she find acceptance in Chandrika's world?

programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyan E2
programme.desc: Ganga Mai, abandoned for bearing daughters, defies norms with fierce love and dignity, raising three girls who each forge bold, individual paths shaped by their dreams and inner fire.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E43
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E43
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.desc: Sanjana loves Rahul, but Rahul treats Sanjana as a friend. He is attracted to Nisha, and announces that he will be marrying her soon. Release Year: 1998 Director: Anees Bazmee Awards: 1999 Nominee Filmfare Award -Best Film -Gordhan Tanwani

programme.title: Kapoor & Sons
programme.desc: Arjun and Rahul visit their sick grandfather, but family troubles grow. Tensions peak when a girl creates a rift between them, testing their bond and deepening the chaos at home. Release Year: 2016 Director: Shakun Batra

programme.title: E19 - Odd Dwellings
programme.desc: From calling Veteran's Stadium home to setting up camp in an airport terminal to turning a dumpster into a luxurious abode. Each of these dwellings is so beyond odd that they are truly unbelievable.

programme.title: E1 - The Birth Of Mickey
programme.desc: A cartoon studio creates one of the most recognisable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch, and through a journey of failure, innovation, and guts becomes an American icon.

programme.title: E4 - Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Japan escalates its war in China, drawing increasing US sanctions. Driven by resource shortages and military ideology, Japan attacks Pearl Harbor in a move that will reshape the course of World War II.

programme.title: E3 - Into The Magnetic Storm
programme.desc: The team seeks out the wreck of the Revonoc, a racing yacht that vanished in 1958 with a crew of five. A freak magnetic anomaly was detected in the Triangle when she went missing.

programme.title: E3 - Pig Head
programme.desc: Ronnie faces a challenge in his own territory. Joey and Zak use pig heads to lure in giants. Leron and Porkchop battle a poacher stealing their catch. Troy places a big bet on Spearhead Lake.

programme.title: E3 - The Titan Games Trials 3
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. Winners will advance to the ultimate challenge of Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The male and female competitors who conquer Mt. Olympus will become a Titan, and in the end, the Titans return to battle each other. One woman and one man will be crowned Titan Champions. Dwayne Johnson serves as host and Executive Producer, Liam McHugh and Alex Mendez commentate from the skybox and Cari Champion reports from inside the arena.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: E10 - A Sea Of Silk/Tending The Earth
programme.desc: Chiara Vigo is one of the world's last remaining sea silk weavers, master of a little-known but centuries-old art, and one in danger of extinction. Becoming a farmer at almost 40 is not so easy. But that's what Laura Moser did when she took over her parents' farm.

programme.title: E22 - Jewellery Special
programme.desc: An in-depth look at Chopard and Goossens, jewellers, and their exceptional expertise. Above all, jewellery is a dream, often made in gold. The exquisite Chanel exhibition. The history of the watch and of Richard, gold and silversmith. Parisian jewellery of tomorrow, available today from Persta, Sister Morphine and Karl Mazlo.

programme.title: Madalena
programme.desc: Early spring in the city of Macau. Mada (Louis Cheung), a divorced man in his 40's, is the strong and silent type. He lives in a dilapidated flat that's set for demolition. Suffering from a serious case of amnesia, Mada works the graveyard shift as a taxi driver to overcome the pain of his affliction. One night, Mada picks up Lena (Chrissie Chau), who works as a restaurant receptionist by day and a bar hostess by night. After a misunderstanding sparks spark their friendship, Mada becomes Lena's driver, picking her up before and after work. Lena's arrival finally brings some color into Mada's life; he even begins to think that he can finally move on from his divorce. Yet, Lena feels lonely in Macau; she's disliked by her colleagues, who all think that she is a ruthless, money-grubbing hustler for using her voluptuous figure to get special treatment. Lena knows Mada's feelings for her, but she, too, is hiding a past that she can't get over...
